title: Chichitop Elegant Rhinestones Hard Clutch Pearl Evening Bag with Zip Compartments,Silver

variation_files.prompt: A product shot of the evening bag displayed at a slight three-quarter angle on a plain white background, with the bag oriented diagonally from top-left to bottom-right. The bag features a silver-toned chain strap extending outward from both sides, lying flat and curving gently across the foreground. The chain is made of interlocking oval links and appears to be detachable or adjustable. The bag's body is rectangular with rounded edges, and its front is adorned with a large, cascading decorative element composed of pearls and rhinestones arranged in a teardrop or inverted triangular pattern, centered vertically. The top of the bag includes a metallic clasp or closure embellished with rhinestones, connected to the chain strap via small rings.
